thanks-desc: Waxay ku dartaa xiriirro lagu mahadceliyo isticmaaleyaasha wax ka beddelka, faallooyinka, iwm.
thanks-error-undefined: Ficilka mahadcelinta wuu fashilmay (koodhka khaladka: $1). Fadlan mar kale isku day.
thanks-error-invalid-log-type: Nooca diiwaanka '$1' kuma jiro liiska noocyada diiwaanka ee la oggol yahay.
thanks-error-log-deleted: Gelitaanka diiwaanka la codsaday waa la tirtiray, sidaas darteed mahadcelin looma siin karo.
thanks-error-invalidrevision: Aqoonsiga dib u eegista ma aha mid sax ah.
thanks-error-revdeleted: Lama diri karo mahadcelin sababtoo ah dib u eegista waa la tirtiray.
thanks-error-notloggedin: Isticmaalayaasha aan la aqoonsan ma diri karaan mahadcelin
thanks-error-ratelimited: {{GENDER:$1|Adiga}} waxaad dhaaftay xadka waqtiga la oggol yahay. Fadlan sug wakhti ka dibna mar kale isku day.
echo-pref-tooltip-edit-thank: I ogeysii marka qof iigu mahadceliyo wax ka beddel aan sameeyay.
notification-header-rev-thank: $1 {{GENDER:$2|waan}} {{GENDER:$4|kaaga}} mahad celinayaa bedelka aad ku samaysay '''$3'''.
notification-bundle-header-rev-thank: {{PLURAL:$1|Hal qof|$1 qof|100=99+ qof}} ayaa uga mahadceliyay {{GENDER:$3|adiga}} tafatirkaaga ee $2.
notification-bundle-header-log-thank: {{PLURAL:$1|Hal qof|$1 qof|100=99+ qof}} ayaa uga mahadceliyay {{GENDER:$3|adiga}} falkaaga la xiriira $2.
log-description-thanks: Hoos waxaa ku qoran liiska isticmaalayaasha ay isticmaalayaal kale u mahadceliyeen.
thanks-error-no-id-specified: Waa inaad sheegtaa aqoonsi dib u eegis ama aqoonsi diiwaan si aad u dirto mahadcelin.
thanks-confirmation-special-log: Ma rabtaa inaad si guud u dirto mahadcelin ficilkan diiwaanka?
thanks-confirmation-special-rev: Ma rabtaa inaad si guud u dirto mahadcelin wax ka beddelkan?
thanks-error-invalidpostid: Aqoonsiga boostada ma aha mid sax ah.
flow-thanks-confirmation-special: Ma rabtaa inaad si guud u dirto mahadcelin faallooyinkan?
flow-thanks-thanked-notice: {{GENDER:$3|Adiga}} ayaa uga mahadceliyay $1 faallada {{GENDER:$2|uu sameeyay|ay sameysay|ay sameeyeen}}.
notification-bundle-header-flow-thank: {{PLURAL:$1|Hal qof|$1 qof|100=99+ qof}} ayaa uga mahadceliyay {{GENDER:$3|adiga}} faalladaada ee "$2".
